tests.description: ATDD API tests for Story 2-2 Donor Self-Service Pickup Intake with Capacity Check (RED PHASE)
acceptance_criteria_covered: Given a donor submits eligibility and item details, when capacity is evaluated, then the system returns schedulable slots or explicit refusal with alternatives.
Given a donor receives a schedulable or refusal outcome, when they review the result, then next steps and reasons are clearly visible in UI/API payloads.

summary: Generated 5 FAILING API tests for Story 2-2
